nodes.name: On Any Workflow Error
nodes.notes: Set as the Error Workflow (in workflow Settings) for both the Orchestrator and Process Single Lead. Fires only on uncaught crashes, not on expected per-lead failures already handled by their own Stop-And-Error branches.

nodes.name: Format Error Alert
nodes.notes: Error Trigger's item shape varies slightly across n8n versions, so every field is read defensively with a fallback.

nodes.name: Alert Admin of Crash
nodes.notes: Replace the placeholder recipient with the real team inbox.
